facts.claim: Surface codes are the de facto industrial QEC
facts.evidence_quote: Surface codes remain the dominant modality, with logical qubit counts crossing 1000 in late 2025

facts.claim: Google demonstrated below-threshold operation on 72-qubit Sycamore-class device
facts.evidence_quote: Google demonstrated below-threshold operation on a 72-qubit Sycamore-class device

facts.claim: IBM Heron R3 announced 156-qubit error-corrected operation with real-time decoding
facts.evidence_quote: IBM's Heron R3 announced 156-qubit error-corrected operation with real-time decoding

facts.claim: Microsoft Majorana-based topological qubit program showed first coherent logical operations in early 2026
facts.evidence_quote: Microsoft's Majorana-based topological qubit program showed first coherent logical operations in early 2026

facts.claim: Fault-tolerant quantum computing will require ~1M physical qubits per logical qubit (10x reduction)
facts.evidence_quote: fault-tolerant quantum computing will require approximately 1 million physical qubits per logical qubit, down from earlier estimates of 10 million
